title: Tallest and Shortest Women Meet
story: Imagine towering over everyone you meet! On November 20, 2024, the world's tallest woman, Rumeysa Gelgi from Turkey, met the world's shortest woman, Jyoti Amge from India. title: Ancient Skull Reveals Human Ancestor
story: Buried for millions of years, a remarkable discovery emerged from the earth in 1997. This ancient relic belonged to a human ancestor who lived about two and a half million years ago. The find confirmed a new species called Australopithecus garhi, adding an exciting piece to the puzzle of human evolution. On November 20, this groundbreaking fossil came to light in Bouri, Middle Awash.

title: Olympic Champ's Bold Boxing Leap
story: Pete Rademacher packed a powerful punch in the boxing world. Born in Tieton, Washington in 1928, he clinched Olympic gold in the heavyweight division. But Rademacher wasn't content with amateur glory. He made history on November 20 by becoming the first boxer ever to challenge for the world heavyweight title in his very first professional fight!
activity_question: What unique boxing record did Pete Rademacher set?
